revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 12 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 12 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月12日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[開化天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[紀元前157年]][[1月2日]]） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]]が即位 * [[建興]]4年（ユリウス暦[[316年]][[12月12日]]） - [[西晋]]が滅亡 * [[元禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1688年]][[12月4日]]） - [[徳川綱吉]]が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]]を[[側用人]]に抜擢 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月23日]]） - [[津田梅子]]ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月12日]]） - 礼服にそれまでの裃などの[[和服]]を廃止し[[洋服]]を採用する太政官布告
== 誕生日 == * [[治承]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1178年]][[12月22日]]） - [[安徳天皇]]、81代[[天皇]]（+ [[1185年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[12月10日]]） - [[国司信濃]]、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1842年]]） * 元治元年（グレゴリオ暦1864年12月10日） - [[福原越後]]、長州藩家老（* [[1815年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月11日 (旧暦)|11月11日]] 翌日[[11月13日 (旧暦)|11月13日]] - 前月[[10月12日 (旧暦)|10月12日]] 翌月[[12月12日 (旧暦)|12月12日]] *新暦[[11月12日]]
{{stub}}

== できごと == * [[開化天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[紀元前157年]][[12月11日]]） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]]が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]]4年（ユリウス暦[[316年]][[12月12日]]） - [[西晋]]が滅亡 * [[元禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1688年]][[12月4日]]） - [[徳川綱吉]]が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]]を[[側用人]]に抜擢 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月23日]]） - [[津田梅子]]ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月12日]]） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]]などの[[和服]]を廃止し[[洋服]]を採用する太政官布告
== 誕生日 == * [[治承]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1178年]][[12月22日]]） - [[安徳天皇]]<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>、81代[[天皇]]（+ [[1185年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[12月10日]]） - [[国司親相]]、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1842年]]） * 元治元年（グレゴリオ暦1864年12月10日） - [[福原元僴]]、長州藩家老（* [[1815年]]）

== できごと == * [[開化天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[紀元前157年]][[12月11日]]） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]]が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]]4年（ユリウス暦[[316年]][[12月12日]]） - [[西晋]]が滅亡 * [[元禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1688年]][[12月4日]]） - [[徳川綱吉]]が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]]を[[側用人]]に抜擢 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月23日]]） - [[津田梅子]]ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月12日]]） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]]などの[[和服]]を廃止し[[洋服]]を採用する太政官布告
== 誕生日 == * [[治承]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1178年]][[12月22日]]） - [[安徳天皇]]<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>、81代[[天皇]]（+ [[1185年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[12月10日]]） - [[国司親相]]、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1842年]]） * 元治元年（グレゴリオ暦1864年12月10日） - [[福原元僴]]、長州藩家老（* [[1815年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}

adding boilerplate intro to all the days

trying to comment out all the bad overview sections I made earlier
adding these as a part 1 of a few steps to get names on the things

Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"

I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates

switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion

removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
revision.text:
[[sn:November 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] [[zh:十一月十二]] [[en:draft:November 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[開化天皇]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[紀元前157]][[12月11日]]） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]]が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]]4年（ユリウス暦[[316]][[12月12日]]） - [[西晋]]が滅亡 * [[元禄]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1688]][[12月4日]]） - [[徳川綱吉]]が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]]を[[側用人]]に抜擢 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871]][[12月23日]]） - [[津田梅子]]ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872]][[12月12日]]） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]]などの[[和服]]を廃止し[[洋服]]を採用する太政官布告
== Births == * [[治承]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1178]][[12月22日]]） - [[安徳天皇]]<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>、81代[[天皇]]（+ [[1185]]）
== Deaths == * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[12月10日]]） - [[国司親相]]、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1842]]） * 元治1st year（グレゴリオ暦1864年12月10日） - [[福原元僴]]、長州藩家老（* [[1815]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}

== Births == * [[治承]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[1178]][[12月22日]]） - [[安徳天皇]]<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>、81代[[天皇]]（+ [[1185]]）
== Deaths == * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[12月10日]]） - [[国司親相]]、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1842]]） * 元治1st year（グレゴリオ暦1864年12月10日） - [[福原元僴]]、長州藩家老（* [[1815]]）

[[sn:November 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] [[zh:十一月十二]] [[en:draft:November 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前157]] [[December 11]] ） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]] が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[316]] [[December 12]] ） - [[西晋]] が滅亡 * [[Genroku]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1688]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]] を[[側用人]] に抜擢 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 23]] ） - [[津田梅子]] ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 12]] ） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]] などの[[和服]] を廃止し[[洋服]] を採用する太政官布告
== Births == * [[治承]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1178]] [[December 22]] ） - [[安徳天皇]] <ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}} </ref>、81代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1185]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 10]] ） - [[国司親相]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1842]] ） * 元治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1864th year 12月10日） - [[福原元僴]] 、Chōshū Domain家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}

[[sn:November 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] [[zh:十一月十二]] [[en:draft:November 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前157]] [[December 11]] ） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]] が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[316]] [[December 12]] ） - [[西晋]] が滅亡 * [[Genroku]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1688]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]] を[[側用人]] に抜擢 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 23]] ） - [[津田梅子]] ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 12]] ） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]] などの[[和服]] を廃止し[[洋服]] を採用する太政官布告
== Births == * [[治承]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1178]] [[December 22]] ） - [[安徳天皇]] <ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}} </ref>、81代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1185]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 10]] ） - [[国司親相]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1842]] ） * 元治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1864th year 12月10日） - [[福原元僴]] 、Chōshū Domain家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前157]] [[December 11]] ） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]] が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[316]] [[December 12]] ） - [[西晋]] が滅亡 * [[Genroku]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1688]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]] を[[側用人]] に抜擢 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 23]] ） - [[津田梅子]] ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 12]] ） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]] などの[[和服]] を廃止し[[洋服]] を採用する太政官布告
== Births == * [[治承]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1178]] [[December 22]] ） - [[安徳天皇]] <ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}} </ref>、81代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1185]] ）

[[sn:November 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] [[zh:十一月十二]] [[en:draft:November 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前157]] [[December 11]] ） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]] が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[316]] [[December 12]] ） - [[西晋]] が滅亡 * [[Genroku]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1688]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]] を[[側用人]] に抜擢 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 23]] ） - [[津田梅子]] ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 12]] ） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]] などの[[和服]] を廃止し[[洋服]] を採用する太政官布告
== Births == * [[治承]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1178]] [[December 22]] ） - [[安徳天皇]] <ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}} </ref>、81代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1185]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 10]] ） - [[国司親相]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1842]] ） * 元治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1864th year 12月10日） - [[福原元僴]] 、Chōshū Domain家老（* [[1815]] ）

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前157]] [[December 11]] ） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]] が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[316]] [[December 12]] ） - [[西晋]] が滅亡 * [[Genroku]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1688]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]] を[[側用人]] に抜擢 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 23]] ） - [[津田梅子]] ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 12]] ） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]] などの[[和服]] を廃止し[[洋服]] を採用する太政官布告
== Births == * [[治承]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1178]] [[December 22]] ） - [[安徳天皇]] <ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}} </ref>、81代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1185]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 10]] ） - [[国司親相]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 家老（* [[1842]] ） * 元治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1864th year 12月10日） - [[福原元僴]] 、Chōshū Domain家老（* [[1815]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}}) – The 9th Emperor, {{ill|Kaika Tennō|ja|開化天皇}}, ascended to the throne.{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|316|ja|316}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[Genroku]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1688|ja|1688}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|徳川綱吉}} selected his aide, {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|ja|柳沢吉保}}, as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|ja|津田梅子}}, departed Yokohama for the United States. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1178|ja|1178}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – {{ill|Antoku Tennō|ja|安徳天皇}}, the 81st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1185|ja|1185}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Kunishi Chisanao|ja|国司親相}}, a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1842|ja|1842}}). * In the same Genji 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|ja|1815}}).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add commemorations if needed -->

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}}) – The 9th Emperor, {{ill|Kaika Tennō|ja|開化天皇}}, ascended to the throne.{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|316|ja|316}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[Genroku]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1688|ja|1688}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|徳川綱吉}} selected his aide, {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|ja|柳沢吉保}}, as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|ja|津田梅子}}, departed Yokohama for the United States. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1178|ja|1178}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – {{ill|Antoku Tennō|ja|安徳天皇}}, the 81st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1185|ja|1185}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Kunishi Chisanao|ja|国司親相}}, a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1842|ja|1842}}). * In the same Genji 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|ja|1815}}).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]]

== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Kunishi Chisanao|ja|国司親相}}, a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1842|ja|1842}}). * In the same Genji 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|ja|1815}}).

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|12=draft}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日|12=draft}}) – The 9th Emperor, {{ill|Kaika Tennō|ja|開化天皇|12=draft}}, ascended to the throne.{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|316|ja|316|12=draft}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[Genroku]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1688|ja|1688|12=draft}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|徳川綱吉|12=draft}} selected his aide, {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|ja|柳沢吉保|12=draft}}, as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft}} {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日|12=draft}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|ja|津田梅子|12=draft}}, departed Yokohama for the United States. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|12=draft}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1178|ja|1178|12=draft}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Antoku Tennō|ja|安徳天皇|12=draft}}, the 81st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1185|ja|1185|12=draft}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864|12=draft}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kunishi Chisanao|ja|国司親相|12=draft}}, a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1842|ja|1842|12=draft}}). * In the same Genji 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=draft}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|ja|1815|12=draft}}).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|安徳天皇|" to "|安徳天皇|1=Emperor Antoku|2=ja|3=安徳天皇|4=de|5=Antoku|"
revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|12=draft}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日|12=draft}}) – The 9th Emperor, {{ill|Kaika Tennō|ja|開化天皇|12=draft}}, ascended to the throne.{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|316|ja|316|12=draft}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[Genroku]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1688|ja|1688|12=draft}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|徳川綱吉|12=draft}} selected his aide, {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|ja|柳沢吉保|12=draft}}, as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft}} {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日|12=draft}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|ja|津田梅子|12=draft}}, departed Yokohama for the United States. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|12=draft}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1178|ja|1178|12=draft}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Antoku Tennō|ja|安徳天皇|1=Emperor Antoku|2=ja|3=安徳天皇|4=de|5=Antoku|12=draft}}, the 81st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1185|ja|1185|12=draft}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864|12=draft}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kunishi Chisanao|ja|国司親相|12=draft}}, a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1842|ja|1842|12=draft}}). * In the same Genji 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=draft}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|ja|1815|12=draft}}).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 12 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:translated pages]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月12日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[開化天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[紀元前157年]][[12月11日]]） - 第9代・[[開化天皇]]が即位{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[建興 (晋)|建興]]4年（ユリウス暦[[316年]][[12月12日]]） - [[西晋]]が滅亡 * [[元禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1688年]][[12月4日]]） - [[徳川綱吉]]が、納戸役・[[柳沢吉保]]を[[側用人]]に抜擢 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月23日]]） - [[津田梅子]]ら5人の日本初の女子留学生が横浜港からアメリカへ出発 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月12日]]） - 礼服にそれまでの[[裃]]などの[[和服]]を廃止し[[洋服]]を採用する太政官布告
== 誕生日 == * [[治承]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1178年]][[12月22日]]） - [[安徳天皇]]<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>、81代[[天皇]]（+ [[1185年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[12月10日]]） - [[国司親相]]、[[長州藩]]家老（* [[1842年]]） * 元治元年（グレゴリオ暦1864年12月10日） - [[福原元僴]]、長州藩家老（* [[1815年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 12|qq=November 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The 9th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Kaika Tennō]], ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:316|316]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] selected his aide, [[:en:Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu]], as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including [[:en:Tsuda Umeko|Tsuda Umeko]], departed Yokohama for the United States. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1178|1178]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Emperor Antoku|Emperor Antoku]], the 81st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1185|1185]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|qq=}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The 9th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Kaika Tennō]], ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:316|316]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] selected his aide, [[:en:Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu]], as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including [[:en:Tsuda Umeko|Tsuda Umeko]], departed Yokohama for the United States. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.

== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|qq=}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840309]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 12|qq=November 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The 9th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Kaika Tennō]], ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:316|316]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] selected his aide, [[:en:Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu]], as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including [[:en:Tsuda Umeko|Tsuda Umeko]], departed Yokohama for the United States. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1178|1178]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Emperor Antoku|Emperor Antoku]], the 81st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1185|1185]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|qq=|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The 9th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Kaika Tennō]], ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:316|316]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] selected his aide, [[:en:Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu]], as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including [[:en:Tsuda Umeko|Tsuda Umeko]], departed Yokohama for the United States. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1178|1178]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Emperor Antoku|Emperor Antoku]], the 81st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1185|1185]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|qq=|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十二]][[zh:十一月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840309]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 12|qq=November 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The 9th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Kaika Tennō]], ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:316|316]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] selected his aide, [[:en:Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu]], as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including [[:en:Tsuda Umeko|Tsuda Umeko]], departed Yokohama for the United States. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1178|1178]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Emperor Antoku|Emperor Antoku]], the 81st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1185|1185]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112|qq=}}

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十二]][[zh:十一月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840309]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 12|qq=November 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The 9th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Kaika Tennō]], ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:316|316]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] selected his aide, [[:en:Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu]], as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including [[:en:Tsuda Umeko|Tsuda Umeko]], departed Yokohama for the United States. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1178|1178]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Emperor Antoku|Emperor Antoku]], the 81st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1185|1185]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]]
{{translated page|ja|11月12日 (旧暦)|version=83630715|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 12 of Japanese Lunar months]] }}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:November 12 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 11월 12일]] [[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月十二]]
[[ar:November 12 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- Add commemorations if needed -->
[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] {{wikidata link|Q840309}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The 9th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Kaika Tennō]], ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:316|316]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] selected his aide, [[:en:Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu]], as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including [[:en:Tsuda Umeko|Tsuda Umeko]], departed Yokohama for the United States. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1178|1178]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Emperor Antoku|Emperor Antoku]], the 81st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1185|1185]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 12일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十二]][[zh:十一月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 12일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十二]][[zh:十一月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十二]][[zh:十一月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840309]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 12|qq=November 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The 9th Emperor, [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Kaika Tennō]], ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:316|316]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1688|1688]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]] selected his aide, [[:en:Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu]], as his official (sōi) and advisor. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including [[:en:Tsuda Umeko|Tsuda Umeko]], departed Yokohama for the United States. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1178|1178]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Emperor Antoku|Emperor Antoku]], the 81st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1185|1185]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Kunishi Shinano|Kunishi Chisanao]], a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1842|1842]]). * In the same Genji 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born [[:en:1815|1815]]).
== Commemorations ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – The 9th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kaika|en|Emperor Kaika|WD=Q333548|lt=Kaika Tennō}}, ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|316|en|316|WD=Q31894|lt=316}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1688|en|1688|WD=Q7671|lt=1688}} {{ill|December 4|en|December 4|WD=Q2310|lt=December 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|WD=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}} selected his aide, {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|en|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|WD=Q846911|lt=Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu}}, as his official (sōi) and advisor. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 23|en|December 23|WD=Q2676|lt=December 23}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|en|Tsuda Umeko|WD=Q514524|lt=Tsuda Umeko}}, departed Yokohama for the United States. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1178|en|1178|WD=Q19696|lt=1178}} {{ill|December 22|en|December 22|WD=Q2636|lt=December 22}}) – {{ill|Emperor Antoku|en|Emperor Antoku|WD=Q316651|lt=Emperor Antoku}}, the 81st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|WD=Q1325419|lt=Genji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}}) – {{ill|Kunishi Shinano|en|Kunishi Shinano|WD=Q6444766|lt=Kunishi Chisanao}}, a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}}). * In the same Genji 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – The 9th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kaika|en|Emperor Kaika|WD=Q333548|lt=Kaika Tennō}}, ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|316|en|316|WD=Q31894|lt=316}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1688|en|1688|WD=Q7671|lt=1688}} {{ill|December 4|en|December 4|WD=Q2310|lt=December 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|WD=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}} selected his aide, {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|en|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|WD=Q846911|lt=Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu}}, as his official (sōi) and advisor. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 23|en|December 23|WD=Q2676|lt=December 23}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|en|Tsuda Umeko|WD=Q514524|lt=Tsuda Umeko}}, departed Yokohama for the United States. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1178|en|1178|WD=Q19696|lt=1178}} {{ill|December 22|en|December 22|WD=Q2636|lt=December 22}}) – {{ill|Emperor Antoku|en|Emperor Antoku|WD=Q316651|lt=Emperor Antoku}}, the 81st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|WD=Q1325419|lt=Genji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}}) – {{ill|Kunishi Shinano|en|Kunishi Shinano|WD=Q6444766|lt=Kunishi Chisanao}}, a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}}). * In the same Genji 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kaika Tennō|Kaika Tennō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|157 BC|ja|紀元前157|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – The 9th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kaika|en|Emperor Kaika|WD=Q333548|lt=Kaika Tennō}}, ascended to the throne.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * [[Kenkō (era)|Kenkō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|316|en|316|WD=Q31894|lt=316}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1688|en|1688|WD=Q7671|lt=1688}} {{ill|December 4|en|December 4|WD=Q2310|lt=December 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|WD=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}} selected his aide, {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|en|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|WD=Q846911|lt=Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu}}, as his official (sōi) and advisor. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 23|en|December 23|WD=Q2676|lt=December 23}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|en|Tsuda Umeko|WD=Q514524|lt=Tsuda Umeko}}, departed Yokohama for the United States. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1178|en|1178|WD=Q19696|lt=1178}} {{ill|December 22|en|December 22|WD=Q2636|lt=December 22}}) – {{ill|Emperor Antoku|en|Emperor Antoku|WD=Q316651|lt=Emperor Antoku}}, the 81st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|WD=Q1325419|lt=Genji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}}) – {{ill|Kunishi Shinano|en|Kunishi Shinano|WD=Q6444766|lt=Kunishi Chisanao}}, a senior retainer (家老) of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}}). * In the same Genji 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1864, December 10) – {{ill|Fukuhara Motomi|ja|福原元僴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara Motomi|1=Echigo Fukuhara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11591845}}, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}}).
== Commemorations ==

BC|ja|紀元前157|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/157 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}) – The 9th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|316|en|316|WD=Q31894|lt=316|1=316}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12|1=December 12}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty Tsunayoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}} selected his aide, {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|en|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|WD=Q846911|lt=Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|1=Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu}}, as his official (sōi) and advisor. {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|December 23|en|December 23|WD=Q2676|lt=December 23|1=December 23}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|en|Tsuda Umeko|WD=Q514524|lt=Tsuda Umeko|1=Tsuda Umeko}}, departed Yokohama for the United States. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12|1=December 12}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as the kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * [[Chishō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1178|en|1178|WD=Q19696|lt=1178|1=1178}} {{ill|December 22|en|December 22|WD=Q2636|lt=December 22|1=December 22}}) – {{ill|Emperor Antoku|en|Emperor Antoku|WD=Q316651|lt=Emperor Antoku|1=Emperor Antoku}}, the 81st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇|qq=}}</ref>
